config_description:
The "Blue Ocean" Map. Specific markets where category demand is high (active sentiments) but supply is thin (<5 competitors) in cities with 50k+ population.

These records are the only locations in the Sun Belt West US (TX, AZ, NM, NV, LA) that pass a strict tri-factor test for high density, severe market undersupply, and immediate micro-radius opportunity.
config_name: White Space Finder in Sun Belt West States, US
